import re

def validate_for_sql_injection(input_string):
    if not isinstance(input_string, str):
        return True

    test_string = input_string.lower()

    sql_injection_patterns = [
        r'\b(union|select|insert|update|delete|drop|truncate|alter|create|exec|xp_cmdshell)\b',
        r'\b(and|or)\b\s+\d+=\d+',
        r'\b(and|or)\b\s+\w+=\w+',
        r'\b(sleep|benchmark|pg_sleep|waitfor delay)\b',
        r'(information_schema|sys\.objects|pg_catalog)\.',
        r'\bcast\(.+?\s+as\s+\w+\)',
        r'\bconvert\(.+?\s+as\s+\w+\)',
        r'\bchar\(.+?\)',
        r'\bconcat\(.+?\)',
        r'\bsubstr\(.+?\)',
        r'\bsubstring\(.+?\)',
        r'\bmid\(.+?\)',
        r'\bascii\(.+?\)',
        r'\bhex\(.+?\)',
        r'\bunhex\(.+?\)',
        r'\bload_file\(.+?\)',
        r'\b(into|dump)file\s+\'.+?\'',
        r'\boutfile\s*=\s*\'.+?\'',
        r'\bfrom\s+\w+\s+where\s+\w+\s*=\s*',
        r'\bgroup\s+by\b',
        r'\border\s+by\b',
        r'\bhaving\b',
        r'--',
        r'/\*',
        r'\*/',
        r';',
        r'\s*\'|\"\s*(or|and)\s*\'|\"\s*\d+=\d+',
        r'\'\s*or\s*\d+=\d+',
        r'"\s*or\s*\d+=\d+',
        r'\'\s*(xor|and|or)\s*\'',
        r'\'\s*(xor|and|or)\s*\'\d+=\d+',
        r'(\%27|\%22)(or|and)\s*(\%27|\%22)\d+=\d+',
        r'\buser\s*=',
        r'\bpassword\s*=',
        r'\bcurrent_user\b',
        r'\bcurrent_database\b',
        r'\bversion\(\)',
        r'\bdatabase\(\)',
        r'\buser\(\)',
        r'\b@@version\b',
        r'\b@@datadir\b',
        r'\b@@hostname\b',
        r'\b@@port\b',
        r'\bpg_user\b',
        r'\bpg_database\b',
        r'\bpg_current_query\b',
        r'\b(sysobjects|syscolumns|master\.dbo\.spt_values)\b',
        r'utl_inaddr\.get_host_address',
        r'dbms_pipe\.receive_message',
        r'\/\*!\d+select.*?\*\/'
    ]

    for pattern in sql_injection_patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, test_string):
            return True

    return False
